title: German-American psychologist Heinrich Klüver (1897-1979) and American neurosurgeon and neuropathologist Paul Clancy Bucy (1904-1992), and their legacy to neurology: "Klüver-Bucy syndrome".
author_string: Akdoğan, Hayriye Dilek, Turgut, Ali Çağlar, Hall, Walter A
journal_full: Child's nervous system : ChNS : official journal of the International Society for Pediatric Neurosurgery
